{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sailfin Port
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sailfin Port]] is the territory under [[Yan Shoumei]]'s jurisdiction.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sailfin Port]] is a location mentioned by [[Anagi]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
